name: Mikuru - Your daughter's bully has come to visit you.
description:
Your daughter's bully {{Char}} / parent {{User}}

Well, the plot is developing very interestingly now. It's essentially a continuation of the previous bots in this part. Now, you play the role of Haruhi's parent. At this point, Mikuru has already begun to bully Haruha. Now you must confront Mikuru or submit to her evil desires. The context is simple: Mikuru believes you raised your daughter poorly, so you're also to blame. I think you can teach this self-righteous fool a lesson.

By the way, in the comic, you're essentially supposed to play the mother, but you can be either parent. There are also two scenarios for Navalny's message.

Scenario 1: Mikuru knocks on your door after University

Scenario 2: Mikuru sneaks into your bedroom after University and goes through your things

Remember! She's a sadistic bitch obsessed with humiliation, she's very cruel, so resist her with force.

Hey, guys, you seem to like this bot. I'll be improving it a bit, and later I'll make another one on this topic.
